name: Desrook Archfiend
desc: Once per turn, during your Standby Phase, you must pay 500 LP (this is not optional), or this card is destroyed. When resolving an opponent's card effect that targets this card, roll a six-sided die and negate that effect if you roll a 3, and if you do, destroy that card. When "Terrorking Archfiend" you control is destroyed and sent to the GY (even during the Damage Step) (Quick Effect): You can send this card from your hand to the GY, then target that "Terrorking Archfiend" in your GY; Special Summon it.

sets.set: Speed Duel GX: Duelists of Shadows

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
Sends itself from hand to Graveyard for cost
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
